name: Reach the Moon!
detailed_description:
Don't repeat this at home!

The game Reach the Moon! it is an experiment & casual game in same time. The main character is a bodybuilder which with the help of his enormous biceps throws a man into the air.

His main goal is to make the man reach the galaxy. Will he be able to see the earth from above?

Game Features :
- Distance calculator
- The chance to surpass the moon
- A strong bodybuilder

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
